meta.name: Ighawosa Omoma
meta.title: AI Automation Engineer
meta.subtitle: Power Platform Developer & Intelligent Process Automation Specialist
meta.tagline: I design the pipelines that move enterprise data through automation, AI agents, and back into the hands of the people who need it.

about.summary: Results-driven Power Platform Developer with 2+ years of experience delivering enterprise low-code solutions using Power Apps, Power Automate (Cloud & Desktop), Copilot Studio, Power BI, Dataverse, and SharePoint Online. Strong background in business process automation, AI-driven conversational agents, and Power Platform governance within regulated enterprise environments.

facts.label: Currently
facts.value: Business Process Automation Engineer, FirstBank Nigeria

facts.label: Education
facts.value: B.Eng. Electrical/Electronics Engineering, University of Benin

metrics.label: Manual effort reduced through end-to-end automation
Copilot Studio AI agent built at FirstBank Nigeria
Production automations shipped across banking operations

projects.name: Enterprise Product Knowledge AI Agent
projects.input: Staff queries on internal product information
projects.process: Copilot Studio conversational agent grounded in a governed Dataverse knowledge source, with structured topics and fallback handling
projects.output: Instant, accurate product answers — the first agent of its kind built at FirstBank Nigeria

projects.name: Excel-to-Dataverse Data Pipeline
projects.process: Automated ingestion with validation, error-handling, and data-integrity checks before commit
projects.output: A structured, searchable Dataverse dataset powering the AI knowledge agent

projects.name: Email & Document Hyperautomation
projects.process: Cloud flow triggers hand off to desktop RPA bots, which process content into SharePoint and notify users via a live dashboard
projects.output: 80%+ reduction in manual operational effort and faster turnaround

projects.name: Enterprise Synergy Collaboration Platform
projects.process: Multi-level approval workflow with dynamic status tracking and automated notifications
projects.output: Unified cross-location collaboration with full progress visibility

projects.name: World-Check Login RPA Bot
projects.process: Secure browser automation handling credentials, login, and error recovery
projects.output: Reliable, unattended compliance checks with enterprise-grade error handling

projects.name: API-to-Database Automation Bot
projects.process: Consumes and parses JSON responses, transforms data, and inserts into a production database
projects.output: A production-ready sync between external services and internal systems

exploring.name: Loan Approval Prediction (AI/ML)
exploring.desc: A Python and Pandas machine learning pipeline on Kaggle data — preprocessing, exploratory analysis, and a loan-approval prediction model. In progress.

exploring.name: Energy CRM Platform
exploring.desc: An early-stage concept for a CRM built for energy and utility providers — customer management, ticketing, and AI-assisted support in one workflow.

bullets: Built the bank's first Copilot Studio-based product knowledge conversational agent, enabling staff to retrieve governed product information through a Dataverse knowledge source.
Designed an automated Excel-to-Dataflow-to-Dataverse pipeline to maintain structured, searchable, up-to-date product data for conversational retrieval.
Implemented logging, error handling, and controlled grounding to improve agent reliability, auditability, and governance.
Developed and deployed several Power Apps integrated with Dataverse and SharePoint Online to streamline enterprise banking operations.
Automated end-to-end processes with Power Automate Cloud Flows, reducing manual effort by 80%+.

Pioneered a Power Apps–Power Automate–RPA integration pattern that monitored bot-generated emails, processed content and attachments into SharePoint, notified users via dashboard, and routed responses back to the bot for continued automation.
Partnered with PMO, Control, Compliance, and business teams to deliver compliant, scalable automation solutions.

details: Thesis: Design, Simulation, and Testing of a Model Automation System for an Injection Substation
